methodology_sections: 1.1 Asset Inventory - Financial assets, state assets, privilege assets, reputation assets
1.3 System Architecture Mapping - Contract hierarchies, dependencies, upgrade patterns, access control
2.1 Entry Point Enumeration - Public/external functions, callbacks, parameter analysis

financial_assets: ETH held by PoolManager (via receive()) and Proxy instances (via receive())
ETH held by YieldEthStakingLido / YieldEthStakingEtherfi (receive()) and swept via emergencyEtherTransfer()
ERC20 liquidity held in PoolManager storage-context (delegatecalled module code holds tokens at PoolManager address): availableLiquidity per asset, plus actual ERC20 balances on PoolManager
ERC721 liquidity/collateral held by PoolManager (actual NFTs escrowed at PoolManager address)
Protocol fee accrual: DataTypes.AssetData.accruedFee (scaled) and minted to treasury as protocol supply balance via executeCollectFeeToTreasury
Auction bid escrow: DataTypes.AssetData.totalBidAmout (ERC20 bid amounts tracked) and corresponding on-chain ERC20 balances
Yield strategy assets held in per-user YieldAccount clones (e.g., stETH, eETH, sDAI positions)
Underlying assets moved between YieldStakingBase managers and Pool Yield module (yieldBorrowERC20/yieldRepayERC20 flows)
Unlimited ERC20 approvals granted by YieldStakingBase managers to PoolManager (underlyingAsset.approve(poolManager, max))
Unlimited approvals granted by YieldAccount to external protocols (stETH/unstETH, eETH/liquidityPool, DAI/sDAI) via safeApprove() (manager-controlled)
state_assets: Global protocol pause state in Configurator (OpenZeppelin Pausable) affecting module functions guarded by whenNotPaused
PoolStorage (diamond-like fixed slot) at STORAGE_POSITION_POOL: addressProvider, wrappedNativeToken, nextPoolId, poolLookup, poolList
Per-pool PoolData: isPaused, enabledGroups, groupList, assetLookup, assetList, loanLookup (ERC721->tokenId->IsolateLoanData), accountLookup, yield flags (isYieldEnabled/isYieldPaused/yieldGroup)

Per-asset AssetData configuration: assetType, decimals, classGroup, caps (supplyCap/borrowCap/yieldCap), enable flags (isActive/isFrozen/isPaused/isBorrowingEnabled/isFlashLoanEnabled/isYieldEnabled/isYieldPaused), risk params (feeFactor/collateralFactor/liquidationThreshold/liquidationBonus/redeemThreshold/bidFineFactor/minBidFineFactor/auctionDuration)
Per-asset interest state: supplyRate, supplyIndex, lastUpdateTimestamp; per-group interest state: borrowRate, borrowIndex, rateModel
Per-asset accounting: totalScaledCrossSupply/IsolateSupply, userScaledCrossSupply/IsolateSupply, availableLiquidity, totalBidAmout, accruedFee
ERC721 token accounting: erc721TokenData[tokenId] => owner, supplyMode, lockerAddr
Account flags/permissions: AccountData.suppliedAssets set, borrowedAssets set, operatorApprovals[asset][operator]
Isolated loan state: IsolateLoanData (reserveAsset, scaledAmount, reserveGroup, loanStatus, auction/bid fields)
Module dispatch tables in PoolManager Storage: moduleLookup (moduleId->impl), proxyLookup (moduleId->proxy), trustedSenders (proxy->(moduleId,moduleImpl)), reentrancyLock
PriceOracle state: BASE_CURRENCY(+UNIT), NFT_BASE_CURRENCY(+UNIT), bendNFTOracle, assetChainlinkAggregators mapping
ACLManager state: roles in AccessControlUpgradeable (DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE, POOL_ADMIN_ROLE, EMERGENCY_ADMIN_ROLE, ORACLE_ADMIN_ROLE)
YieldRegistry state: yieldAccountImplementation, yieldManagers set, addressProvider

YieldStakingBase state: botAdmin, totalDebtShare, totalUnstakeFine, yieldAccounts mapping(user->YieldAccount), accountYieldShares, nftConfigs, stakeDatas(nft->tokenId->YieldStakeData), accountYieldInWithdraws
privilege_assets: ACL roles (ACLManager): DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE can grant/revoke all roles; POOL_ADMIN_ROLE; EMERGENCY_ADMIN_ROLE; ORACLE_ADMIN_ROLE

Pool admin powers via Configurator/ConfigureLogic/PoolLogic: create/delete pools, add/remove assets & groups, set caps/params, enable/disable borrowing/flashloan/yield, set rate models, set manager yield caps, collect fees to treasury
Emergency admin powers: global pause via Configurator.setGlobalPause(), per-pool pause via setPoolPause()
PoolManager onlyPoolAdmin: emergencyEtherTransfer(), emergencyProxyEtherTransfer() (sweep ETH from PoolManager / Proxy)
Proxy creator authority (PoolManager is creator): Proxy.emergencyEtherTransfer() and special fallback log-emission path when msg.sender==creator
YieldRegistry onlyPoolAdmin: addYieldManager(), setYieldAccountImplementation(), rescue() (arbitrary calls from YieldAccount via registry)
YieldAccount manager authority: execute/executeWithValue (arbitrary external calls), safeTransfer, safeTransferNativeToken, safeApprove
reputation_assets: Protocol solvency and accounting integrity: supply/borrow indices, scaled balances, fee accrual and treasury minting
User positions: cross-margin suppliedAssets/borrowedAssets flags, isolated NFT loan status/auction state, yield staking stakeDatas and shares
Governance/role legitimacy: ACL role assignments and oracle correctness (price feeds), yield manager whitelist in YieldRegistry
Auction integrity: bid escrow totals and isolate loan auction state (bidStartTimestamp, first/last bidder, bidAmount)

system_architecture.inheritance_hierarchy: PoolManager <- Base <- (Storage, OZ Pausable, OZ ERC721Holder). BaseModule <- Base; Configurator and Yield modules inherit BaseModule. PriceOracle is OZ Initializable. ACLManager is OZ AccessControlUpgradeable. YieldRegistry is OZ PausableUpgradeable + ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable. YieldStakingBase is OZ Initializable + PausableUpgradeable + ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable; specialized strategies inherit YieldStakingBase. YieldAccount is OZ Initializable.
external_dependencies: OpenZeppelin (Pausable, ERC721Holder, AccessControlUpgradeable, Initializable, PausableUpgradeable, ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable, SafeERC20/SafeERC20Upgradeable, EnumerableSetUpgradeable, ClonesUpgradeable, Math.mulDiv, Address.functionCall)
External protocol interfaces: Lido (IStETH, IUnstETH), EtherFi (ILiquidityPool, IeETH, IWithdrawRequestNFT), Maker sDAI (ISavingsDai)
Bend protocol system interfaces: IAddressProvider, IACLManager, IPoolManager, IYield, IYieldRegistry, IYieldAccount, IPriceOracleGetter, IInterestRateModel, IDelegateRegistryV2, IWETH
system_architecture.upgrade_patterns: Core lending system uses a custom modular proxy/dispatcher: PoolManager holds state and delegatecalls into module implementations via dispatch(). User-facing module proxies are minimal Proxy contracts that forward calls to PoolManager.dispatch() and append original caller address as trailing calldata. Separate components (PriceOracle, ACLManager, YieldRegistry, YieldStakingBase strategies) are upgradeable via OZ Initializable pattern (intended to be deployed behind proxies off-chain, though proxy contracts are not included here). YieldAccount is a minimal clone (EIP-1167) created by YieldRegistry.
system_architecture.access_control_structure: Role checks are externalized through AddressProvider->ACLManager: Pool admin, emergency admin, oracle admin. PoolManager has onlyPoolAdmin for emergency sweeps. Configurator and ConfigureLogic enforce pool/emergency admin via PoolLogic. PriceOracle enforces onlyOracleAdmin. YieldRegistry enforces onlyPoolAdmin for manager whitelist and rescue. YieldAccount restricts actions to yieldManager (strategy contract) or registry (rescue). YieldStakingBase restricts configuration to onlyPoolAdmin; botAdmin has limited authority to force unstake/repay flows.

state_changes: none directly (but delegatecalled modules can mutate ALL PoolManager storage, including PoolStorage slot and module tables if they have code paths)

entry_points.function: emergencyProxyEtherTransfer(address proxyAddr, address to, uint256 amount)

upgradeability_surface.notes: Not an OZ proxy, but a custom dispatcher that delegatecalls into arbitrary module implementations. Any module shares PoolManager storage; incorrect layout assumptions or malicious module upgrades can corrupt state. Module upgrade/installation entry points are not included in provided scope (installer module referenced in constructor).
Minimal forwarder with immutable creator and custom fallback that forwards to PoolManager.dispatch(). Not upgradeable.
Runs via PoolManager delegatecall (module). Uses OZ Pausable inherited in Base; pause state is stored in PoolManager. Storage coupling across modules is critical.
Runs via PoolManager delegatecall (module). Mutates PoolStorage slot and asset/group accounting stored in PoolManager.

Initializable contract with constructor _disableInitializers(); intended for proxy deployment (proxy type not in scope; UUPS assumed but not proven). Ensure initialize() called exactly once and implementation is not left uninitialized behind proxy.

Initializable AccessControlUpgradeable with constructor _disableInitializers(); intended for proxy deployment (proxy type not in scope; UUPS assumed but not proven). DEFAULT_ADMIN_ROLE controls grantRole/revokeRole.

Initializable PausableUpgradeable/ReentrancyGuardUpgradeable with constructor _disableInitializers(); intended for proxy deployment. Creates EIP-1167 clones of YieldAccount; has admin rescue capability.
EIP-1167 clone target. initialize() sets registry and manager. Arbitrary external calls possible by yieldManager; arbitrary rescue calls possible by registry.

Initializable strategy managers (Etherfi/Lido/sDAI) with constructor _disableInitializers(); intended for proxy deployment. Stores substantial user position state; storage layout stability critical across upgrades.
